title: alnus alnobetula subsp. sinuata
intro: Alnus alnobetula subsp. sinuata, also known as the sinuous green alder, is a subspecies of the green alder tree (Alnus alnobetula) native to Russia and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Alnus alnobetula subsp. sinuata include the reduction of blood pressure, improvement of respiratory health, and the prevention of certain types of cancer. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations have also been used to treat digestive issues and promote wound healing.
